prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 6.2L V8 (engine code: L410) with a fully built, dry-sumped 7.0L V8 based on the L410 block, featuring forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Schrick (280° intake/288° exhaust duration, 0.550" lift) and titanium retainers from Ferrea Racing.

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (86mm compressor wheels) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves. Custom intercooler setup by Bell Intercoolers (1,200hp-rated core) with 3.5" mandrel-bent aluminum piping and silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance. Fuel system upgrade to dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator.

Drivetrain & Handling: Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lockup) and a Tilton twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel. Suspension overhaul with custom-valved Öhlins TTX46 coilovers (adjustable damping and ride height) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro. Braking system upgrade to Alcon 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads.
estetica: Bodywork: Full custom widebody conversion by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) with hand-rolled fenders, carbon fiber side skirts, and a bespoke front splitter from APR Performance. Rear diffuser and GT-style wing by Vorsteiner, finished in a custom matte British Racing Green with gold pinstriping by Stripes Unlimited.

Wheels & Tires: Custom 20x9.5" (front) and 20x11" (rear) forged wheels by HRE Performance (FF03 model) in a gold brushed finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 R20 front, 315/30 R20 rear). Brake calipers painted in Bentley Racing Green with gold accents.

Interior: Full retrim in Bridge of Weir leather with diamond stitching by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter) and a digital dash cluster by AIM MXS Strada. Rear seats removed and replaced with a custom carbon fiber storage compartment by VRSF, housing a bespoke audio system with Focal Utopia Be speakers and a JL Audio HD1200/1 amplifier.
